revision.text:
local JRWest = "%1 Station (JR West)" local Fukui = "%1 Station (Fukui)" local Hiroshima = "%1 Station (Hiroshima)" local Hyogo = "%1 Station (Hyogo)" local Ishikawa = "%1 Station (Ishikawa)" local Kyoto = "%1 Station (Kyoto)" local Nara = "%1 Station (Nara)" local Okayama = "%1 Station (Okayama)" local Osaka = "%1 Station (Osaka)" local Shimane = "%1 Station (Shimane)" local Shiga = "%1 Station (Shiga)" local Tottori = "%1 Station (Tottori)" local Yamaguchi ="%1 Station (Yamaguchi)" local p = { ["lang"] = "en-GB", ["system icon"] = "[[File:JR logo (west).svg|20px|link=West Japan Railway Company|alt=Logo of the West Railway Company (JR West)]]", ["system title"] = "[[West Japan Railway Company|JR West]]", ["system color"] = "006CC5", ["name format"] = { "font-family: sans-serif; background-color: transparent; font-size: 150%; color: black; padding: 0.1em; line-height: 1.2em; white-space: nowrap; text-align: center; border-bottom: 8px solid #006CC5;", ["o"] = "font-family: sans-serif; background-color: transparent; font-size: 150%; color: black; padding: 0.1em; line-height: 1.2em; white-space: nowrap; text-align: center;", }, ["header background color"] = "0068B7", ["header text color"] = "ffffff", ["station format"] = { "%1 Station", ["Aioi"] = Hyogo, ["Akasaki"] = Tottori, ["Akitsu"] = Hiroshima, ["Amagasaki"] = JRWest, ["Asagiri"] = Hyogo, ["Asaka"] = Osaka, ["Asari"] = Shimane, ["Ashiya"] = Hyogo, ["Awazu"] = "Awazu Station (Ishikawa)", ["Chōfu"] = Yamaguchi, ["Daimon"] = Hiroshima, ["Fujimichō"] = Tottori, ["Fuchū"] = Hiroshima, ["Fukui"] = Fukui, ["Funaoka"] = Kyoto, ["Hanazono"] = Kyoto, ["Hase"] = Hyogo, ["Hattori"] = Okayama, ["Higashi-Matsue"] = Shimane, ["Higashiyamakōen"] = Tottori, ["Himekawa"] = "Himekawa Station (Niigata)", ["Hira"] = Shiga, ["Hirano"] = "Hirano Station (JR West)", ["Hiyoshi"] = Kyoto, ["Hongō"] = Hiroshima, ["Ichiba"] = "Ichiba Station (JR West)", ["Ikuno"] = Hyogo, ["Inō"] = Yamaguchi, ["Iwakura"] = Yamaguchi, ["Iwata"] = Yamaguchi, ["Itami"] = "Itami Station (JR West)", ["Jōtō"] = Okayama, ["Kabe"] = Hiroshima, ["Kagawa"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kamisugi"] = Hiroshima, ["Kamo"] = Kyoto, ["Kanagawa"] = Okayama, ["Katsuragawa"] = Kyoto, ["Kawanishi"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kiyama"] = Fukui, ["Kiwa"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kizu"] = Kyoto, ["Kōchi"] = Hiroshima, ["Kōdo"] = Hiroshima, ["Kōjiro"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kōnan"] = Shimane, ["Kōriyama"] = Nara, ["Kuromatsu"] = Shimane, ["Kushiro"] = Shimane, ["Kyōbashi"] = Osaka, ["Kusatsu"] = Shiga, ["Makino"] = Shiga, ["Matsuzaki"] = Tottori, ["Mitani"] = Yamaguchi, ["Mitsuishi"] = Okayama, ["Miyoshi"] = Hiroshima, ["Mikawa"] = Ishikawa, ["Mikunigaoka"] = Osaka, ["Mikuriya"] = Tottori, ["Miyoshi"] = Hiroshima, ["Moriyama"] = Shiga, ["Motomachi"] = Hyogo, ["Nagahara"] = Shiga, ["Nagao"] = Osaka, ["Nagai"] = Osaka, ["Nakashima"] = Hiroshima, ["Nawa"] = Tottori, ["Nii"] = Hyogo, ["Nijo"] = Kyoto, ["Nishinomiya"] = "Nishinomiya Station (JR West)", ["Nogi"] = Shimane, ["Nonoichi"] = JRWest, ["Nozaki"] = Osaka, ["Oda"] = Shimane, ["Okubo"] = Hyogo, ["Ōji"] = Nara, ["Ōmachi"] = Hiroshima, ["Ōmoto"] = Okayama, ["Ono"] = Shiga, ["Ōshio"] = Fukui, ["Ōtoba"] = "Ōtoba Station (Fukui)", ["Saidaiji"] = Okayama, ["Sakata"] = Shiga, ["Sakurai"] = Nara, ["Sangō"] = Nara, ["Sannomiya"] = "Sannomiya Station (JR West)", ["Seta"] = Shiga, ["Shimoyama"] = Kyoto, ["Shiki"] = Osaka, ["Shinden"] = Kyoto, ["Shinohara"] = Shiga, ["Shin-Osaka"] = "[[Shin-Ōsaka Station|Shin-Ōsaka]]", ["Shioya"] = Hyogo, ["Sōgo"] = Okayama, ["Sone"] = Hyogo, ["Suita"] = "Suita Station (JR West)", ["Sumiyoshi"] = "Sumiyoshi Station (JR West)", ["Takada"] = Nara, ["Takeda"] = Hyogo, ["Takagi"] = Hiroshima, ["Takaida"] = Osaka, ["Takamatsu"] = Ishikawa, ["Takarazuka"] = "Takarazuka Station (JR West)", ["Takatori"] = Hyogo, ["Takatsu"] = Kyoto, ["Taki"] = Hyogo, ["Tarumi"] = Hyogo, ["Tatsuno"] = Hyogo, ["Tennō"] = Hiroshima, ["Tōjō"] = Hiroshima, ["Tokiwa"] = Yamaguchi, ["Tokuda"] = Ishikawa, ["Tomari"] = Tottori, ["Toyooka"] = Hyogo, ["Tsukaguchi"] = JRWest, ["Uji"] = "Uji Station (JR West)", ["Urayasu"] = "Urayasu Station (Tottori)", ["Yamaguchi"] = Yamaguchi, ["Yamanouchi"] = Hiroshima, ["Yamazaki"] = Kyoto, ["Yokoyama"] = Ishikawa, ["Yoshikawa"] = Ishikawa, ["Yoshitomi"] = Kyoto, ["Yaga"] = Hiroshima, ["Yasu"] = Shiga, ["Yuki"] = Hiroshima, }, ["lines"] = { ["_default"] = { ["color"] = "0068B7", ["text color"] = "FFFFFF", }, ["Hokuriku Shinkansen"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Shinkansen jrw.svg|18px|link=Hokuriku Shinkansen]]", ["title"] = "[[Hokuriku Shinkansen]]", ["color"] = "24197c", ["left terminus"] = "Tsuruga", ["right terminus"] = "Jōetsumyōkō", ["types"] = { ["Kagayaki"] = { ["title"] = "", ["right terminus"] = "Nagano", }, ["Hakutaka"] = { ["title"] = "", }, ["Tsurugi"] = { ["title"] = "", ["left terminus"] = "Tsuruga", ["right terminus"] = "Toyama", }, }, }, ["Sanyo Shinkansen"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'yō Shinkansen]]", ["color"] = "24197c", ["icon"] = "[[File:Shinkansen jrw.svg|18px|link=San'yō Shinkansen]]", ["left terminus"] = "Hakata", ["right terminus"] = "Shin-Ōsaka", ["types"] = { ["Kodama"] = { ["title"] = "''[[Kodama (train)|Kodama]]''", ["left terminus"] = {"Hakata", "Hakataminami"}, }, ["Mizuho"] = { ["title"] = "[[Mizuho (train)|''Mizuho'']]", }, ["Nozomi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Nozomi (train)|''Nozomi'']]", }, ["Hikari"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hikari (train)|''Hikari'']]", }, ["Sakura"] = { ["title"] = "[[Sakura (train service)|''Sakura'']]", }, }, }, ["Akō"] = { ["title"] = "[[Akō Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Okayama", ["right terminus"] = "Aioi", ["types"] = { ["A"] = { ["title"] = "", ["short name"] = "A", ["color"] = "0072BF", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=Akō Line]]", }, ["N"] = { ["title"] = "", ["short name"] = "N", ["color"] = "EA5E60", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-N.svg|18px|link=Akō Line]]", }, }, }, ["Bantan"] = { ["title"] = "[[Bantan Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Himeji", ["right terminus"] = "Wadayama", ["color"] = "b11e52", ["short name"] = "J", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-J.svg|18px|link=Bantan Line]]", }, ["Biwako"] = { ["title"] = "[[Biwako Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["right terminus"] = "Nagahama", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["short name"] = "A", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=Biwako Line]]", }, ["Fukuen"] = { ["title"] = "[[Fukuen Line]]", ["color"] = "49479e", ["left terminus"] = "Miyoshi", ["right terminus"] = "Fukuyama", ["short name"] = "Z", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-Z.svg|18px|link=Fukuen Line]]", }, ["Gakkentoshi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Katamachi Line|Gakkentoshi Line]]", ["color"] = "FF1493", ["left terminus"] = "Kyōbashi", ["right terminus"] = "Kizu", ["short name"] = "H", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-H.svg|18px|link=Fukuen Line]]", }, ["Gantoku"] = { ["title"] = "[[Gantoku Line]]", ["color"] = "00a663", ["left terminus"] = "Kushigahama", ["right terminus"] = "Iwakuni", }, ["Geibi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Geibi Line]]", ["color"] = "8F76D6", ["left terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["right terminus"] = "Niimi", ["short name"] = "P", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-P.svg|18px|link=Geibi Line]]", }, ["Hakataminami"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hakataminami Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Hakataminami", ["right terminus"] = "Hakata", ["color"] = "0073bc", ["types"] = { ["Kodama"] = { ["title"] = "''[[Kodama (train)|Kodama]]''", }, }, }, ["Hakubi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hakubi Line]]", ["color"] = "378640", ["left terminus"] = "Yonago", ["right terminus"] = "Okayama", ["short name"] = "V", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW san-V.svg|18px|link=Hakubi Line]]", }, ["Hanwa"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hanwa Line]]", ["color"] = "FF8E1F", ["left terminus"] = "Wakayama", ["right terminus"] = "Tennoji", ["short name"] = "R", ["text color"] = "000000", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-R.svg|18px|link=Hanwa Line]]", }, ["Hokuriku"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hokuriku Main Line]]", ["color"] = "0073bc", ["left terminus"] = "Maibara", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuruga", ["types"] = { ["A"] = { ["title"] = "", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=Hokuriku Line]]", ["short name"] = "A", }, }, }, ["Honshi-Bisan"] = { ["title"] = "[[Honshi-Bisan Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Utazu", ["right terminus"] = "Chayamachi", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["short name"] = "M", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-M.svg|18px|link=Honshi-Bisan Line]]", }, ["Inbi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Inbi Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Tsuyama", ["right terminus"] = "Tottori", ["color"] = "BB7D2E", ["short name"] = "B", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW san-B.svg|18px|link=Inbi Line]]", }, ["Kabe"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kabe Line]]", ["color"] = "09c0b0", ["left terminus"] = "Aki-Kameyama", ["right terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["short name"] = "B", ["text color"] = "FFFFFF", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-B.svg|18px|link=Kabe Line]]", }, ["Kabe former"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kabe Line]]", ["color"] = "A757A8", ["left terminus"] = "Sandankyō", ["right terminus"] = "Hiroshima", }, ["Kakogawa"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kakogawa Line]]", ["color"] = "00BAA5", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-I.svg|18px|link=Kakogawa Line]]", ["short name"] = "I", ["left terminus"] = "Kakogawa", ["right terminus"] = "Tanikawa", }, ["Kansai"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kansai Main Line|Kansai Line]]", ["color"] = "4B3794", ["short name"] = "V", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-V.svg|18px|link=Kansai Main Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kamo", ["right terminus"] = "Nagoya", }, ["Kansai Airport"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kansai Airport Line]]", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["left terminus"] = "Kansai Airport", ["right terminus"] = "Hineno", ["short name"] = "S", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-S.svg|18px|link=Kansai Airport Line]]", }, ["Kibi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kibi Line]]", ["color"] = "F3AABA", ["short name"] = "U", ["text color"] = "000000", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-U.svg|18px|link=Kibi Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Sōja", ["right terminus"] = "Okayama", }, ["Kinokuni"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kisei Main Line|Kinokuni Line]]", ["color"] = "00A7C0", ["left terminus"] = "Wakayama", ["right terminus"] = "Shingū", ["short name"] = "W", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-W.svg|18px|link=Kisei Main Line]]", }, ["Kishin"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kishin Line]]", ["color"] = "FF593E", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-K.svg|18px|link=Kishin Line]]", ["short name"] = "K", ["left terminus"] = "Niimi", ["right terminus"] = "Himeji", }, ["Kisuki"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kisuki Line]]", ["color"] = "FFBA00", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW san-E.svg|18px|link=Kisuki Line]]", ["short name"] = "E", ["text color"] = "000000", ["left terminus"] = "Shinji", ["right terminus"] = "Bingo Ochiai", }, ["Kōbe"] = { ["title"] = "[[JR Kōbe Line]]", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["short name"] = "A", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=JR Kōbe Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Himeji", ["right terminus"] = "Ōsaka", }, ["Kosei"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kosei Line]]", ["color"] = "00A8E4", ["short name"] = "B", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-B.svg|18px|link=Kosei Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuruga", }, ["Kure"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kure Line]]", ["color"] = "D38C06", ["text color"] = "000000", ["short name"] = "Y", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-Y.svg|18px|link=Kure Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["right terminus"] = "Mihara", }, ["Kusatsu"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kusatsu Line]]", ["color"] = "5a9934", ["short name"] = "C", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-C.svg|18px|link=Kusatsu Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kusatsu", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuge", }, ["Kyōto"] = { ["title"] = "[[JR Kyōto Line]]", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["left terminus"] = "Kyōto", ["right terminus"] = "Ōsaka", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=JR Kyōto Line]]", ["short name"] = "A", }, ["Maizuru"] = { ["title"] = "[[Maizuru Line]]", ["color"] = "FF8E1F", ["left terminus"] = "Ayabe", ["right terminus"] = "Higashi-Maizuru", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-L.svg|18px|link=Maizuru Line]]", ["short name"] = "L", ["text color"] = "000000", }, ["Mine"] = { ["title"] = "[[Mine Line]]", ["color"] = "dc208f", ["left terminus"] = "Asa", ["right terminus"] = "Nagatoshi", }, ["Nara"] = { ["title"] = "[[Nara Line (JR West)|Nara Line]]", ["color"] = "b67c2b", ["short name"] = "D", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-D.svg|18px|link=Nara Line (JR West)]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["right terminus"] = "Nara", }, ["Nanao"] = { ["title"] = "[[Nanao Line#JR West|JR Nanao Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Tsubata", ["right terminus"] = "Wakura-Onsen", }, ["Obama"] = { ["title"] = "[[Obama Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Higashi-Maizuru", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuruga", }, ["Oito"] = { ["title"] = "[[Ōito Line]]", ["color"] = "997191", ["left terminus"] = "Itoigawa", ["right terminus"] = "Minami-Otari", }, ["Onoda"] = { ["title"] = "[[Onoda Line]]", ["color"] = "776493", ["left terminus"] = "Ube-Shinkawa", ["right terminus"] = {"Onoda", "Nagato-Motoyama"}, }, ["Osaka"] = { ["title"] = "[[Osaka Loop Line]]", ["color"] = "e80000", ["left terminus"] = "Tennōji", ["right terminus"] = "Shin-Imamiya", ["short name"] = "O", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-O.svg|18px|link=Osaka Loop Line]]", }, ["Osaka Higashi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Osaka Higashi Line]]", ["color"] = "387394", ["left terminus"] = "Shin-Ōsaka", ["right terminus"] = "Kyūhōji", ["short name"] = "F", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-F.svg|18px|link=Osaka Higashi Line]]", }, ["Man-yō Mahoroba"] = { ["title"] = "[[Sakurai Line|Man-yō Mahoroba Line (Sakurai Line)]]", ["color"] = "c62828", ["left terminus"] = "Takada", ["right terminus"] = "Nara", ["short name"] = "U", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-U.svg|18px|link=Sakurai Line]]", }, ["Sakai"] = { ["title"] = }, ["Sakurajima"] = { ["title"] = "[[Sakurajima Line|JR Yumesaki Line]]", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-P.svg|18px|link=Sakurajima Line]]", ["color"] = "003C88", ["left terminus"] = "Sakurajima", ["right terminus"] = "Nishikujō", ["short name"] = "P", }, ["San'in"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'in Main Line]]", ["color"] = "006cc5", ["left terminus"] = "Shimonoseki", ["right terminus"] = "Masuda", }, ["San'in E"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'in Line]]", ["color"] = "878DDC", ["left terminus"] = "Kinosaki-Onsen", ["right terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["short name"] = "E", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW = "R", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-R.svg|18px|link=San'yō Line]]", }, ["San'yo G"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'yō Line]]", ["color"] = "71a557", ["left terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["right terminus"] = ["right terminus"] = "Fukuyama", ["short name"] = "X", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-X.svg|18px|link=San'yō Line]]", }, ["San'yo W"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'yō Line]]", ["color"] = "F5A300", ["text color"] = "000000", ["left terminus"] = "Fukuyama", ["right terminus"] = "Okayama", ["short name"] = "W", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-W.svg|18px|link=San'yō Line]]", }, ["San'yo S"] = { ["title"] = terminus"] = "Sasayamaguchi", ["right terminus"] = "Ōsaka", ["short name"] = "G", ["text color"] = "000000", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-G.svg|18px|link=San'yō Line]]", }, ["Tōkaidō"] = { ["title"] = Line]]", }, ["Tsuyama"] = { ["title"] = "[[Tsuyama Line]]", ["color"] = "FCC900", ["left terminus"] = "Okayama", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuyama", ["short name"] = "T", ["text color"] = "000000", oka-L.svg|18px|link=Uno Line]]", }, ["Wadamisaki"] = { ["title"] = "[[Wadamisaki Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Wadamisaki", ["right terminus"] = "Kōbe", }, ["Wakayama"] = { ["title"] = "[[Wakayama Line]]", ["color"] = "F79FBA", ["left terminus"] = "Ōji", ["right terminus"] = "Wakayama", ["short name"] = "T", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-T.svg|18px|link=Wakayama Line]]", ["text color"] = "000000", }, ["Yamaguchi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Yamaguchi Line]]", ["color"] = "F37052", ["left terminus"] = "Shin-Yamaguchi", ["right terminus"] = "Masuda", }, ["Yamatoji"] = { ["title"] = "[[Yamatoji Line]]", ["color"] = "00A569", ["left terminus"] = "JR Namba", ["right terminus"] = "Kamo", ["short name"] = "Q", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-Q.svg|18px|link=Yamatoji Line]]", }, }, ["aliases"] = { ["sakurai"] = "Man-yō Mahoroba", ["sanyo shinkansen"] = "Sanyo Shinkansen", ["ss"] = "Sanyo Shinkansen", ["m"] = "Honshi-Bissan", ["o"] = "Osaka", ["q"] = "Yamatoji", ["sanin"] = "San'in", ["jr yumesaki"] = "Sakurajima", ["yumesaki"] = "Sakurajima", ["sakurajima"] = "Sakurajima", ["ako"] = "Akō", ["kure"] = "Kure", ["tsuyama"] = "Tsuyama", ["inbi"] = "Inbi", ["imbi"] = "Inbi", ["tozai"] = "JR Tozai", ["jrtozai"] = "JR Tozai", ["osaka higashi"] = "Osaka Higashi", ["osakahigashi"] = "Osaka Higashi", ["oh"] = "Osaka Higashi", ["fukuchiyama"] = "Takarazuka", ["jr kyoto"] = "Kyōto", ["jrkyoto"] = "Kyōto", ["kyoto"] = "Kyōto", ["kobe"] = "Kōbe", ["bantan"] = "Bantan", ["kibi"] = "Kibi", ["momotarō"] = "Kibi", ["momotaro"] = "Kibi", ["kisei"] = "Kinokuni", ["kinokuni"] = "Kinokuni", ["kusatsu"] = "Kusatsu", ["hakata minami"] = "Hakataminami", ["hakataminami"] = "Hakataminami", ["hakata-minami"] = "Hakataminami", ["wadamisaki"] = "Wadamisaki", ["uno"] = "Uno", ["tokaido"] = "Tōkaidō", }, }
return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing the templates
revision.text:
local JRWest = "%1 Station (JR West)" local Fukui = "%1 Station (Fukui)" local Hiroshima = "%1 Station (Hiroshima)" local Hyogo = "%1 Station (Hyogo)" local Ishikawa = "%1 Station (Ishikawa)" local Kyoto = "%1 Station (Kyoto)" local Nara = "%1 Station (Nara)" local Okayama = "%1 Station (Okayama)" local Osaka = "%1 Station (Osaka)" local Shimane = "%1 Station (Shimane)" local Shiga = "%1 Station (Shiga)" local Tottori = "%1 Station (Tottori)" local Yamaguchi ="%1 Station (Yamaguchi)" local p = { ["lang"] = "en-GB", ["system icon"] = "[[File:JR logo (west).svg|20px|link=West Japan Railway Company|alt=Logo of the West Railway Company (JR West)]]", ["system title"] = "[[West Japan Railway Company|JR West]]", ["system color"] = "006CC5", ["name format"] = { "font-family: sans-serif; background-color: transparent; font-size: 150%; color: black; padding: 0.1em; line-height: 1.2em; white-space: nowrap; text-align: center; border-bottom: 8px solid #006CC5;", ["o"] = "font-family: sans-serif; background-color: transparent; font-size: 150%; color: black; padding: 0.1em; line-height: 1.2em; white-space: nowrap; text-align: center;", }, ["header background color"] = "0068B7", ["header text color"] = "ffffff", ["station format"] = { "%1 Station", ["Aioi"] = Hyogo, ["Akasaki"] = Tottori, ["Akitsu"] = Hiroshima, ["Amagasaki"] = JRWest, ["Asagiri"] = Hyogo, ["Asaka"] = Osaka, ["Asari"] = Shimane, ["Ashiya"] = Hyogo, ["Awazu"] = "Awazu Station (Ishikawa)", ["Chōfu"] = Yamaguchi, ["Daimon"] = Hiroshima, ["Fujimichō"] = Tottori, ["Fuchū"] = Hiroshima, ["Fukui"] = Fukui, ["Funaoka"] = Kyoto, ["Hanazono"] = Kyoto, ["Hase"] = Hyogo, ["Hattori"] = Okayama, ["Higashi-Matsue"] = Shimane, ["Higashiyamakōen"] = Tottori, ["Himekawa"] = "Himekawa Station (Niigata)", ["Hira"] = Shiga, ["Hirano"] = "Hirano Station (JR West)", ["Hiyoshi"] = Kyoto, ["Hongō"] = Hiroshima, ["Ichiba"] = "Ichiba Station (JR West)", ["Ikuno"] = Hyogo, ["Inō"] = Yamaguchi, ["Iwakura"] = Yamaguchi, ["Iwata"] = Yamaguchi, ["Itami"] = "Itami Station (JR West)", ["Jōtō"] = Okayama, ["Kabe"] = Hiroshima, ["Kagawa"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kamisugi"] = Hiroshima, ["Kamo"] = Kyoto, ["Kanagawa"] = Okayama, ["Katsuragawa"] = Kyoto, ["Kawanishi"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kiyama"] = Fukui, ["Kiwa"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kizu"] = Kyoto, ["Kōchi"] = Hiroshima, ["Kōdo"] = Hiroshima, ["Kōjiro"] = Yamaguchi, ["Kōnan"] = Shimane, ["Kōriyama"] = Nara, ["Kuromatsu"] = Shimane, ["Kushiro"] = Shimane, ["Kyōbashi"] = Osaka, ["Kusatsu"] = Shiga, ["Makino"] = Shiga, ["Matsuzaki"] = Tottori, ["Mitani"] = Yamaguchi, ["Mitsuishi"] = Okayama, ["Miyoshi"] = Hiroshima, ["Mikawa"] = Ishikawa, ["Mikunigaoka"] = Osaka, ["Mikuriya"] = Tottori, ["Miyoshi"] = Hiroshima, ["Moriyama"] = Shiga, ["Motomachi"] = Hyogo, ["Nagahara"] = Shiga, ["Nagao"] = Osaka, ["Nagai"] = Osaka, ["Nakashima"] = Hiroshima, ["Nawa"] = Tottori, ["Nii"] = Hyogo, ["Nijo"] = Kyoto, ["Nishinomiya"] = "Nishinomiya Station (JR West)", ["Nogi"] = Shimane, ["Nonoichi"] = JRWest, ["Nozaki"] = Osaka, ["Oda"] = Shimane, ["Okubo"] = Hyogo, ["Ōji"] = Nara, ["Ōmachi"] = Hiroshima, ["Ōmoto"] = Okayama, ["Ono"] = Shiga, ["Ōshio"] = Fukui, ["Ōtoba"] = "Ōtoba Station (Fukui)", ["Saidaiji"] = Okayama, ["Sakata"] = Shiga, ["Sakurai"] = Nara, ["Sangō"] = Nara, ["Sannomiya"] = "Sannomiya Station (JR West)", ["Seta"] = Shiga, ["Shimoyama"] = Kyoto, ["Shiki"] = Osaka, ["Shinden"] = Kyoto, ["Shinohara"] = Shiga, ["Shin-Osaka"] = "[[Shin-Ōsaka Station|Shin-Ōsaka]]", ["Shioya"] = Hyogo, ["Sōgo"] = Okayama, ["Sone"] = Hyogo, ["Suita"] = "Suita Station (JR West)", ["Sumiyoshi"] = "Sumiyoshi Station (JR West)", ["Takada"] = Nara, ["Takeda"] = Hyogo, ["Takagi"] = Hiroshima, ["Takaida"] = Osaka, ["Takamatsu"] = Ishikawa, ["Takarazuka"] = "Takarazuka Station (JR West)", ["Takatori"] = Hyogo, ["Takatsu"] = Kyoto, ["Taki"] = Hyogo, ["Tarumi"] = Hyogo, ["Tatsuno"] = Hyogo, ["Tennō"] = Hiroshima, ["Tōjō"] = Hiroshima, ["Tokiwa"] = Yamaguchi, ["Tokuda"] = Ishikawa, ["Tomari"] = Tottori, ["Toyooka"] = Hyogo, ["Tsukaguchi"] = JRWest, ["Uji"] = "Uji Station (JR West)", ["Urayasu"] = "Urayasu Station (Tottori)", ["Yamaguchi"] = Yamaguchi, ["Yamanouchi"] = Hiroshima, ["Yamazaki"] = Kyoto, ["Yokoyama"] = Ishikawa, ["Yoshikawa"] = Ishikawa, ["Yoshitomi"] = Kyoto, ["Yaga"] = Hiroshima, ["Yasu"] = Shiga, ["Yuki"] = Hiroshima, }, ["lines"] = { ["_default"] = { ["color"] = "0068B7", ["text color"] = "FFFFFF", }, ["Hokuriku Shinkansen"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Shinkansen jrw.svg|18px|link=Hokuriku Shinkansen]]", ["title"] = "[[Hokuriku Shinkansen]]", ["color"] = "24197c", ["left terminus"] = "Tsuruga", ["right terminus"] = "Jōetsumyōkō", ["types"] = { ["Kagayaki"] = { ["title"] = "", ["right terminus"] = "Nagano", }, ["Hakutaka"] = { ["title"] = "", }, ["Tsurugi"] = { ["title"] = "", ["left terminus"] = "Tsuruga", ["right terminus"] = "Toyama", }, }, }, ["Sanyo Shinkansen"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'yō Shinkansen]]", ["color"] = "24197c", ["icon"] = "[[File:Shinkansen jrw.svg|18px|link=San'yō Shinkansen]]", ["left terminus"] = "Hakata", ["right terminus"] = "Shin-Ōsaka", ["types"] = { ["Kodama"] = { ["title"] = "''[[Kodama (train)|Kodama]]''", ["left terminus"] = {"Hakata", "Hakataminami"}, }, ["Mizuho"] = { ["title"] = "[[Mizuho (train)|''Mizuho'']]", }, ["Nozomi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Nozomi (train)|''Nozomi'']]", }, ["Hikari"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hikari (train)|''Hikari'']]", }, ["Sakura"] = { ["title"] = "[[Sakura (train service)|''Sakura'']]", }, }, }, ["Akō"] = { ["title"] = "[[Akō Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Okayama", ["right terminus"] = "Aioi", ["types"] = { ["A"] = { ["title"] = "", ["short name"] = "A", ["color"] = "0072BF", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=Akō Line]]", }, ["N"] = { ["title"] = "", ["short name"] = "N", ["color"] = "EA5E60", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-N.svg|18px|link=Akō Line]]", }, }, }, ["Bantan"] = { ["title"] = "[[Bantan Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Himeji", ["right terminus"] = "Wadayama", ["color"] = "b11e52", ["short name"] = "J", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-J.svg|18px|link=Bantan Line]]", }, ["Biwako"] = { ["title"] = "[[Biwako Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["right terminus"] = "Nagahama", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["short name"] = "A", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=Biwako Line]]", }, ["Fukuen"] = { ["title"] = "[[Fukuen Line]]", ["color"] = "49479e", ["left terminus"] = "Miyoshi", ["right terminus"] = "Fukuyama", ["short name"] = "Z", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-Z.svg|18px|link=Fukuen Line]]", }, ["Gakkentoshi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Katamachi Line|Gakkentoshi Line]]", ["color"] = "FF1493", ["left terminus"] = "Kyōbashi", ["right terminus"] = "Kizu", ["short name"] = "H", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-H.svg|18px|link=Fukuen Line]]", }, ["Gantoku"] = { ["title"] = "[[Gantoku Line]]", ["color"] = "00a663", ["left terminus"] = "Kushigahama", ["right terminus"] = "Iwakuni", }, ["Geibi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Geibi Line]]", ["color"] = "8F76D6", ["left terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["right terminus"] = "Niimi", ["short name"] = "P", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-P.svg|18px|link=Geibi Line]]", }, ["Hakataminami"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hakataminami Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Hakataminami", ["right terminus"] = "Hakata", ["color"] = "0073bc", ["types"] = { ["Kodama"] = { ["title"] = "''[[Kodama (train)|Kodama]]''", }, }, }, ["Hakubi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hakubi Line]]", ["color"] = "378640", ["left terminus"] = "Yonago", ["right terminus"] = "Okayama", ["short name"] = "V", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW san-V.svg|18px|link=Hakubi Line]]", }, ["Hanwa"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hanwa Line]]", ["color"] = "FF8E1F", ["left terminus"] = "Wakayama", ["right terminus"] = "Tennoji", ["short name"] = "R", ["text color"] = "000000", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-R.svg|18px|link=Hanwa Line]]", }, ["Hokuriku"] = { ["title"] = "[[Hokuriku Main Line]]", ["color"] = "0073bc", ["left terminus"] = "Maibara", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuruga", ["types"] = { ["A"] = { ["title"] = "", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=Hokuriku Line]]", ["short name"] = "A", }, }, }, ["Honshi-Bisan"] = { ["title"] = "[[Honshi-Bisan Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Utazu", ["right terminus"] = "Chayamachi", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["short name"] = "M", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-M.svg|18px|link=Honshi-Bisan Line]]", }, ["Inbi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Inbi Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Tsuyama", ["right terminus"] = "Tottori", ["color"] = "BB7D2E", ["short name"] = "B", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW san-B.svg|18px|link=Inbi Line]]", }, ["Kabe"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kabe Line]]", ["color"] = "09c0b0", ["left terminus"] = "Aki-Kameyama", ["right terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["short name"] = "B", ["text color"] = "FFFFFF", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-B.svg|18px|link=Kabe Line]]", }, ["Kabe former"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kabe Line]]", ["color"] = "A757A8", ["left terminus"] = "Sandankyō", ["right terminus"] = "Hiroshima", }, ["Kakogawa"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kakogawa Line]]", ["color"] = "00BAA5", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-I.svg|18px|link=Kakogawa Line]]", ["short name"] = "I", ["left terminus"] = "Kakogawa", ["right terminus"] = "Tanikawa", }, ["Kansai"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kansai Main Line|Kansai Line]]", ["color"] = "4B3794", ["short name"] = "V", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-V.svg|18px|link=Kansai Main Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kamo", ["right terminus"] = "Nagoya", }, ["Kansai Airport"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kansai Airport Line]]", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["left terminus"] = "Kansai Airport", ["right terminus"] = "Hineno", ["short name"] = "S", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-S.svg|18px|link=Kansai Airport Line]]", }, ["Kibi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kibi Line]]", ["color"] = "F3AABA", ["short name"] = "U", ["text color"] = "000000", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW oka-U.svg|18px|link=Kibi Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Sōja", ["right terminus"] = "Okayama", }, kinki-W.svg|18px|link=Kisei Main Line]]", }, ["Kishin"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kishin Line]]", ["color"] = "FF593E", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-K.svg|18px|link=Kishin Line]]", ["short name"] = "K", ["left terminus"] = "Niimi", ["right terminus"] = "Himeji", }, ["Kisuki"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kisuki Line]]", ["color"] = "FFBA00", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW san-E.svg|18px|link=Kisuki Line]]", ["short name"] = "E", ["text color"] = "000000", ["left terminus"] = "Shinji", ["right terminus"] = "Bingo Ochiai", }, ["Kōbe"] = { ["title"] = "[[JR Kōbe Line]]", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["short name"] = "A", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=JR Kōbe Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Himeji", ["right terminus"] = "Ōsaka", }, ["Kosei"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kosei Line]]", ["color"] = "00A8E4", ["short name"] = "B", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-B.svg|18px|link=Kosei Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuruga", }, ["Kure"] = { ["title"] = "[[Kure Line]]", ["color"] = "D38C06", ["text color"] = "000000", ["short name"] = "Y", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW hiro-Y.svg|18px|link=Kure Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Hiroshima", ["right terminus"] = "Mihara", }, ["Kusatsu"] = { }, ["Kyōto"] = { ["title"] = "[[JR Kyōto Line]]", ["color"] = "0072bc", ["left terminus"] = "Kyōto", ["right terminus"] = "Ōsaka", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-A.svg|18px|link=JR Kyōto Line]]", ["short name"] = "A", }, ["Maizuru"] = { ["title"] = "[[Maizuru Line]]", ["color"] = "FF8E1F", ["left terminus"] = "Ayabe", ["right terminus"] = "Higashi-Maizuru", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-L.svg|18px|link=Maizuru Line]]", ["short name"] = "L", ["text color"] = "000000", }, ["Mine"] = { ["title"] = "[[Mine Line]]", ["color"] = "dc208f", ["left terminus"] = "Asa", ["right terminus"] = "Nagatoshi", }, ["Nara"] = { ["title"] = "[[Nara Line (JR West)|Nara Line]]", ["color"] = "b67c2b", ["short name"] = "D", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-D.svg|18px|link=Nara Line (JR West)]]", ["left terminus"] = "Kyoto", ["right terminus"] = "Nara", }, ["Nanao"] = { ["title"] = "[[Nanao Line#JR West|JR Nanao Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Tsubata", ["right terminus"] = "Wakura-Onsen", }, ["Obama"] = { ["title"] = "[[Obama Line]]", ["left terminus"] = "Higashi-Maizuru", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuruga", }, ["Oito"] = { ["title"] = "[[Ōito Line]]", ["color"] = "997191", ["left terminus"] = "Itoigawa", ["right terminus"] = "Minami-Otari", }, ["Onoda"] = { ["title"] = "[[Onoda Line]]", ["color"] = "776493", ["left terminus"] = "Ube-Shinkawa", ["right terminus"] = {"Onoda", "Nagato-Motoyama"}, }, ["Osaka"] = { ["title"] = "[[Osaka Loop Line]]", ["color"] = "e80000", ["left terminus"] = "Tennōji", ["right terminus"] = "Shin-Imamiya", ["short name"] = "O", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-O.svg|18px|link=Osaka Loop Line]]", }, ["Osaka Higashi"] = { ["title"] = "[[Osaka Higashi Line]]", ["color"] = "387394", ["left terminus"] = "Shin-Ōsaka", ["right terminus"] = "Kyūhōji", ["short name"] = "F", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-F.svg|18px|link=Osaka Higashi Line]]", }, ["Man-yō Mahoroba"] = { ["title"] = "[[Sakurai Line|Man-yō Mahoroba Line (Sakurai Line)]]", ["color"] = "c62828", ["left terminus"] = "Takada", ["right terminus"] = "Nara", ["short name"] = "U", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-U.svg|18px|link=Sakurai Line]]", }, ["Sakai"] = { ["title"] = ["right terminus"] = "Nishikujō", ["short name"] = "P", }, ["San'in"] = { ["title"] = "[[San'in Main Line]]", ["color"] = "006cc5", ["left terminus"] = "Shimonoseki", ["right terminus"] = "Masuda", }, Line]]", }, ["Tsuyama"] = { ["title"] = "[[Tsuyama Line]]", ["color"] = "FCC900", ["left terminus"] = "Okayama", ["right terminus"] = "Tsuyama", ["short name"] = "T", ["text color"] = "000000", Line]]", ["color"] = "00A569", ["left terminus"] = "JR Namba", ["right terminus"] = "Kamo", ["short name"] = "Q", ["icon"] = "[[File:JRW kinki-Q.svg|18px|link=Yamatoji Line]]", }, }, ["aliases"] = { ["tokaido"] = "Tōkaidō", }, }
return p
